output.requirement: Add gwx auth export and gwx auth import commands for VPS token transfer
output.goal: Allow users to complete OAuth on desktop, export token, and import on VPS without browser
pain_points: VPS users must repeat OAuth browser flow on every new machine
Remote auth still requires browser access somewhere
success_criteria: gwx auth export outputs oauth2.Token as JSON to stdout
gwx auth import accepts token via --json flag, stdin pipe, or interactive paste
Imported token works immediately for all gwx commands
constraints: Must align with existing onboard input patterns
Must work with both KeyringStore and FileStore backends
